parameters.name: list_contacts
parameters.description: List Lexware contacts. Optional: name (search, min 3 chars), customer (true/false), vendor (true/false), page (number).

parameters.name: get_contact
parameters.description: Get full details of a contact. Returns name, address, email, phone, version. Parameter: id (UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: create_company
parameters.description: Create a company contact. Example: companyName=ACME GmbH, street=Hauptstr. 1, zip=80331, city=München, email=info@acme.de, phone=+4989123456

parameters.name: create_person
parameters.description: Create a person contact. Example: lastName=Müller, firstName=Hans, street=Hauptstr. 1, zip=80331, city=München, email=hans@example.de, phone=+4989123456

parameters.name: update_contact_address
parameters.description: Update the address of a contact. Call get_contact first for id+version. Example: id=abc, version=3, street=Strandallee 61, zip=26969, city=Butjadingen

value.street: ={{ $fromAI('street', 'Street name and house number, e.g. Strandallee 61', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_contact_email
parameters.description: Update ONLY the email of a contact. Call get_contact first for id and version. Example: id=abc-123, version=3, email=neu@firma.de

parameters.name: update_contact_phone
parameters.description: Update ONLY the phone of a contact. Call get_contact first for id and version. Example: id=abc-123, version=3, phone=+4930999888

parameters.name: update_contact_name
parameters.description: Update ONLY the name of a contact. Call get_contact first for id and version. Example: id=abc-123, version=3, name=Neuer Firmenname GmbH

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'New company name or person last name', 'string') }}

schema.description: New company name or person last name

parameters.name: list_articles
parameters.description: List Lexware articles (products and services). Optional: type (PRODUCT or SERVICE), page (number).

parameters.name: get_article
parameters.description: Get details of an article. Returns title, type, price, version. Parameter: id (UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: create_article
parameters.description: Create an article. Example: title=Beratung, type=SERVICE, unitName=Stunde, netPrice=120, taxRate=19

parameters.name: update_article
parameters.description: Update an article. Call get_article first for id+version. Example: id=abc, version=1, title=Neuer Name, netPrice=150, taxRate=19

parameters.name: delete_article
parameters.description: Delete an article by ID. Parameter: id (UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: upload_voucher
parameters.description: Upload a voucher/receipt to Lexware. When the user sends a file (photo/PDF), use the file_ref from the attachment. Parameter: file_ref (REQUIRED, the File Bridge reference ID)

value.file_ref: ={{ $fromAI('file_ref', 'File Bridge reference ID from the uploaded attachment', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_quotations
parameters.description: List Lexware quotations (Angebote). Optional: status (draft/open/accepted/rejected), page.

parameters.name: get_quotation
parameters.description: Get details of a quotation including line items and totals. Parameter: id (UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: create_quotation
parameters.description: Create a quotation. Example: contactId=abc-123, lineItems=[{"name":"Beratung","quantity":5,"unitPrice":120,"taxRate":19}], finalize=false

schema.description: true to finalize, false for draft

parameters.name: list_invoices
parameters.description: List Lexware invoices (Rechnungen). Optional: status (draft/open/paidoff/voided), page.

parameters.name: get_invoice
parameters.description: Get details of an invoice including line items and totals. Parameter: id (UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: create_invoice
parameters.description: Create an invoice. Example: contactId=abc-123, lineItems=[{"name":"Beratung","quantity":5,"unitPrice":120,"taxRate":19}], finalize=true

schema.description: true to finalize, false for draft

parameters.name: create_invoice_from_quotation
parameters.description: Create an invoice from an existing quotation. Copies all line items. Example: quotationId=abc-123, finalize=true

schema.description: true to finalize, false for draft

parameters.name: download_invoice
parameters.description: Download an invoice as PDF and send it to the user. Use get_invoice or list_invoices first to find the ID. The PDF will be sent as a file in Telegram. Parameter: id (Invoice UUID, REQUIRED).

parameters.name: download_quotation
parameters.description: Download a quotation as PDF and send it to the user. Use get_quotation or list_quotations first to find the ID. The PDF will be sent as a file in Telegram. Parameter: id (Quotation UUID, REQUIRED).
